Class Bomb

java.lang.Object
Consumable
Bomb
public class Bomb extends Consumable
Class file for the Bomb class, this is a subclass of the abstract Consumable class

Bomb type consumables affect the stat values of both the holder and target

See Also:
  • Consumable

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Bomb(String name, ImageIcon image, int maxCharges, String[] statsToEffectPlayer, int[] statValuesToEffectPlayer, String[] statsToEffectEnemy, int[] statValuesToEffectEnemy, int affectingTurns)
    Constructor for the bomb class

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    useConsumable(Entity holder, Entity target)
    Concrete implementation of the useConsumable method Every time a consumable is used, its remaining charges are decremented If a consumable with no remaining charges is used, nothing happens

    Methods inherited from class Consumable

    countAffectingTurns, getAffectingTurns, getAffectsHolder, getAffectsTarget, getChargesLeft, getEnemyConsumableDescription, getImage, getIsTemporary, getMaxCharges, getName, getPlayerConsumableDescription, getStatsToAffectHolder, getStatsToAffectTarget, getStatValuesToAffectHolder, getStatValuesToAffectTarget, getTotalConsumables, getTurnCounter, getType, resetCharges, useCharges

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Bomb

      public Bomb(String name, ImageIcon image, int maxCharges, String[] statsToEffectPlayer, int[] statValuesToEffectPlayer, String[] statsToEffectEnemy, int[] statValuesToEffectEnemy, int affectingTurns)
      Constructor for the bomb class
      Parameters:
      name - name of the bomb, assumes all names are valid
      image - image of the bomb
      maxCharges - amount of times the bomb can be used in a battle, all values are assumed valid
      statsToEffectPlayer - list of stats to change for the holder
      statValuesToEffectPlayer - list of values to apply to the holder's stats, all values are assumed valid
      statsToEffectEnemy - list of stats to change for the target
      statValuesToEffectEnemy - list of values to apply to the target's stats, all values are assumed valid
      affectingTurns - amount of times the stat values will remain active, all values are assumed valid

  • Method Details

    • useConsumable

      public void useConsumable(Entity holder, Entity target)
      Concrete implementation of the useConsumable method Every time a consumable is used, its remaining charges are decremented If a consumable with no remaining charges is used, nothing happens
      Specified by:
      useConsumable in class Consumable
      Parameters:
      holder - entity object using the consumable
      target - entity object targeted by the consumable
